headline: NRG Energy Weighs AI Power Demand Against Debt And Gas Risks
summary: NRG Energy (NYSE:NRG) executives are spotlighting fast growing electricity demand from AI and data centers in recent interviews and conference appearances. Both the incoming and current CEOs are outlining plans for new generation capacity to meet projected load from digital infrastructure customers. Management is also commenting on how AI adoption, broader energy market conditions, and the conflict in Iran are shaping power sector risks and opportunities. For you as an investor, this focus...

headline: Morgan Stanley Raises PT on NRG Energy (NRG) Stock
summary: NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) is one of the Best Conservative Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 23, Morgan Stanley lifted its price objective on the company’s stock to $157 from $153, while keeping an “Equal Weight” rating, as reported by The Fly. The analyst highlighted that the firm has been updating its price objectives for the broader Regulated […]

headline: Why Is NRG (NRG) Down 17.7% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: NRG (NRG) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
